metadata.title: Online Digital Clock | Real-time Local Time
metadata.description: A minimalist online digital clock that updates every second. Check local time instantly in Japanese or English.

metadata.keywords: online clock,digital clock,local time,current time,real-time clock,japanese clock,english clock

error.clockError: An error occurred while displaying the clock

worldClock.heading: World Clock

utcConverter.heading: UTC Converter
utcConverter.description: Convert a UTC datetime to local time across global cities in one place.
